subject: I need to stay home tomorrow!
body:
Hello Jeffrey...I am really sorry, but I need to stay home tomorrow with
my little boy.  He has pink eye, an ear infection and hives!  He
definitely is not feeling great and i feel the need to be with him for a
day.  If you need me, I'll be around here at home.  Rahna will go in at
8:30 for me.
 
So sorry, and I know by Wed. I will be able to come in.
 
HOpe you had a fabulous birthday!
 
Les
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
body_html:
Hello Jeffrey...I am really sorry, but I need to stay home tomorrow with my little boy.  He has pink eye, an ear infection and hives!  He definitely is not feeling great and i feel the need to be with him for a day.  If you need me, I'll be around here at home.  Rahna will go in at 8:30 for me.
 
So sorry, and I know by Wed. I will be able to come in.
 
HOpe you had a fabulous birthday!
 
Les
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
